name: Seviyan (Sweet Vermicelli)
recipeInstructions:
1. Break the vermicelli into small pieces less than 2.5cm (1 inch) in length. They need not be uniform, but longer pieces make stirring difficult.
2. Heat ghee in a heavy saucepan and fry the vermicelli until golden brown, stirring so it colors evenly. Add hot water and saffron and bring to a boil.
3. Turn off the heat, cover, and simmer gently until the vermicelli is cooked.
4. Add sugar and sultanas and cook uncovered until the liquid is absorbed.
5. Stir in the almonds and cardamom, stir well, and serve warm with cream.
